title: Coverage of Returning Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs)
content:
The following are included under the category of Returning Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs):

1. An OFW who is on vacation or on emergency leave and will resume employment with the same employer in the same worksite.
2. A vacationing OFW who will return to the same employer but in another country or worksite.
3. A worker who has stayed in the country for an extended period and is returning to the same employer.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
